docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-23-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ARCHIE HENSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL ROSENBERRY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ARCHIE HENSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL ROSENBERRY IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUBMIT ANY DOCUMENTATION FOR REVIEW. COPIES OF ALL CANCELLED CHECKS SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT ARE REVIEWED BY THE COURT AS WELL AS SHOWN TO PLAINTIFF FOR EXAMINATION. PLAINTIFF CONFIRMS THAT ALL SIGNED CHECK ARE SIGNED BY HIM EXCEPT FOR ONE IN THE AMOUNT OF $60.00 DEFENDANT STATES THAT HE INFORMED PLAINTIFF OF THIS FACT THAT IT DID NOT APPEAR TO BE SIGNED BY PLAINTIFF AND INSTRUCTED TO GO FURTHER INVESTIGATE THE ISSUE WITH HIS BANK. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THIS WAS NOT DONE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENSON, ARCHIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROSENBERRY, DANIEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $647.00 FILED BY HENSON, ARCHIE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSENBERRY, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENSON, ARCHIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 WAIVER) SERVED MAY-12-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSENBERRY, DANIEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
